records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what do we do? Make a strategic retreat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She seems to be drooling over us, doesn't she? I don't think she's going to casually let us go.

Bei unserem Anblick f95tngt sie an zu sabbern94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a monster in my mother's body, not my mother herself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as the President, I'm obligated to collect all the pieces of the Lake of Knowledge together.
